recommendations.title: Monster
recommendations.overview: The story of Steve Harmon, a 17-year-old honor student whose world comes crashing down around him when he is charged with felony murder.

recommendations.title: Believe Me: The Abduction of Lisa McVey
recommendations.overview: On the night she plans on taking her own life, 17-year-old 'Lisa McVey' is kidnapped and finds herself fighting to stay alive and is raped. She manages to talk her attacker into releasing her, but when she returns home, no one believes her story exce

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Escaped: The Kara Robinson Story
recommendations.overview: Based on a true story. 15-year-old Kara Robinson was kidnapped, assaulted and held captive for 18 hours. With her survival instincts kicking in, she plots a daring escape from the serial killer and leads police to his apartment.

recommendations.title: Return to Zero
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of a successful couple, Maggie and Aaron who are preparing for the arrival of their first child.

recommendations.title: Sherlock: The Abominable Bride
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson find themselves in 1890s London in this holiday special.

recommendations.title: Killing Daddy
recommendations.overview: When Cassie's father finds himself vulnerable and bedridden, she believes she has the perfect revenge for her mother's death.

recommendations.title: Cleveland Abduction
recommendations.overview: A single mother becomes Ariel Castro's first kidnapping victim, and finds herself trapped in his home with two other women for 11 years.

recommendations.title: Love You to Death
recommendations.overview: Inspired by a true story, this film tells the shocking tale of a mother and daughter who are nothing like they seem, their tumultuous relationship ending in a brutal murder.

recommendations.title: The Rutles: All You Need Is Cash
recommendations.overview: The story of the rise and fall of the Pre-Fab Four.

recommendations.title: Escape from Sobibor
recommendations.overview: The true story of WWII's notorious Sobibor Nazi death camp, where a courageous inmate orchestrates and leads the escape of over 300 prisoners.
